positive: A highly detailed and stylized celestial botanical arrangement featuring glowing neon vines, stylized crescent moons, and geometric floral patterns. The composition is symmetrical, centered, and designed for seamless print reproduction. The color palette is deep indigo, vibrant teal, gold foil accents, and luminous lavender. Style is neo-art deco mixed with mystical scientific illustration. High contrast, clean silhouettes, vector art quality, perfect for apparel print, no photographic depth of field, flat lay perspective, golden ratio composition, ultra detailed, ink wash style.
negative: blurry, low resolution, fuzzy, amateur, artifacts, grain, watermarks, signature, text, words, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cropped, noise, messy, dirt, grayscale
